title: Leandra dolichantha
taxonomy: Leandra dolichantha is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. This plant is native to Brazil and is classified within the genus Leandra. The Leandra dolichantha species is part of the larger family Melastomataceae, which includes over 1,300 species of plants. Leandra dolichantha is further classified into the order Myrtales and the clade Rosids. The classification of Leandra dolichantha is based on its botanical characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other plants.
